template-herbal-zh.description: Generate a 4K vertical “Herb Exploded Sheet” infographic poster for a single Chinese herb with labeled parts, properties, and modern forms.

template-evolution.description: Create an isometric pixel-art “evolution museum” timeline scene that maps time progression to spatial progression with bilingual titles.

template-travel-zh.description: Draw a cute hand-drawn travel map with daily route blocks, landmarks, food, lodging, and transport labeled in Simplified Chinese.

template-architecture.description: Produce a landmark architecture HUD-style infographic overlay with measurements, materials, plans/sections, and technical annotations.

template-species-zh.description: Create a cyberpunk-style endangered species knowledge card with six bilingual modules, charts, and a central realistic illustration.

template-character-zh.description: Generate a detailed character concept breakdown board with outfit layers, expressions, props, and handwritten Chinese annotations.

template-recipe-zh.description: Design a festive Chinese New Year recipe poster with ingredients, step-by-step visuals, symbolism, and handwritten Chinese notes.

template-character-analysis-zh.description: Build a character dossier infographic with configurable art style, sections, relationships, and key items laid out as a unified profile.

template-weather.description: Render a mini isometric 3D city weather scene with a central landmark and overlaid weather/date/temperature typography in the city’s language.

template-education-zh.description: Turn a topic into an infographic in either cute cartoon-card style or chalkboard sketch style, matching the input language by default.

template-hot-event-analysis-zh.description: Generate a 3:4 Chinese hot-event analysis infographic with layered causality, mechanism chain, and impact radar maps.

template-intangible-heritage-zh.description: Create a high-density A3-style infographic board explaining a Chinese intangible cultural heritage craft, with history, process, motifs, and modern preservation.

template-education-card.description: Turn an input topic into a Chinese educational infographic in either cute cartoon style or chalkboard scientific sketch style (3:4).

template-costume-zh.description: 生成4K竖版国风服饰专业科普插画（3:4），以黄金构图呈现指定服饰形制，细节还原与视觉美感兼具，适合科普传播与文创设计素材。

template-book-series.description: 为小红书生成6张竖版（3:4）书籍推广图文：封面标题、核心主题、经典语录、核心观点、人物/维度关系、脉络梳理；全套风格统一，适配不同书籍类型。

template-word-scene.description: 生成细节丰富的场景插画，并为所有物体标注英文单词 + IPA + 中文翻译，适合英语学习可视化。

template-cultural-relic-retro-infographi.description: 生成3:4中国风复古信息图海报，以文物手绘插画为中心，四象限科普板块+延伸知识区，典雅稳重、适合社交平台分享。

template-dog-breed-retro-infographic.description: 生成9:16复古科学插画风犬种信息图：精细手绘犬种插画+解剖标注，多板块科普布局，旧纸质感，适合社交平台分享。

template-food.description: 生成4K竖版3:4美食科普信息图海报：水彩手绘主视觉 + 标题 + 制作步骤 + 核心食材 + 区域文化 + 地方记忆。

template-solar-term.description: 生成A3竖版高信息密度节气知识图解海报：中央复古插画，四周环绕文化内涵、交节时间/太阳黄经、三候物候、习俗与农事/养生标签。

template-what-if-history.description: 生成4K竖版3:4复古历史假设信息图海报《What if · 历史逆转计划》：水彩+墨线手绘，暖色旧纸质感，包含完整结构化板块。

template-character-comparison.description: 生成3:4竖版高清人物档案卡：左右分栏古今对比，中间干净分割线，低饱和高级排版，细腻立绘与信息模块齐全，适合人物图鉴/收藏卡。

template-mbti-animal.description: 创作治愈系群像插画：16种MBTI人格拟人动物在指定场景中的日常互动，细节丰富、温暖有趣，并清晰标注MBTI代码。

template-battle.description: 生成竖版国风工笔对决角色档案图卡：左右分屏人物A/B，顶部头像与左右档案信息，底部标志性物品，整体张力拉满。

template-fashion-ecommerce.description: 生成9:16竖版电商服饰详情长图，四段式排版，暖色调、干净高端的商业时尚风格，4K高清，适合电商详情页与社媒展示。

template-portrait-retouching-blueprint.description: 制作专业人像修图蓝图：左右双栏排版，左侧为未修图原图+精准红色标注与英文指令，右侧为按标注完成的真实自然精修效果图。

template-mbti-contrast-zh.description: Generate a 4K vertical MBTI Spring Festival travel comparison meme with two-panel contrast, cute animal characters, Chinese text, red border card style.

template-guofeng-scroll-zh.description: Generate a 4K horizontal Chinese traditional figure group scroll infographic poster with distinct characters, labeled names, and thematic background.

template-species-science-zh.description: Generate a 3:4 scientific infographic illustration with the species in the center and information modules around.

template-city-miniature-zh.description: Generate a high-detail street-style map of a city with a hyper-photorealistic miniature version dynamically emerging from its surface, including landmarks, scenery, streets, trees and transit.

template-hotspot-card-zh.description: Generate a hand-painted watercolor style hot topic knowledge card with clear sections, icons and summary.

template-constellation-steampunk-zh.category: 星座蒸汽朋克解剖图谱类
template-constellation-steampunk-zh.description: Generate a vintage steampunk-style constellation anatomical chart poster with mechanical structure, character modules and steampunk elements.

zh.description: 生成 3:4 竖版超高清 8K 水果科普信息图，包含结构标注、营养价值、产地分布、生长过程、健康功效与发展历史，适合高质量商业化展示。
